title: Settings
subtitle: Organization, branches, application preferences, and security

organization.title: Organization profile
organization.hint: Company name and proprietor appear on all branch receipts and printouts.
organization.dashboard_refresh_hint: Minimum {{min}} seconds. Applies to all users on the dashboard.
organization.dashboard_refresh_min: Dashboard refresh must be at least {{min}} seconds.

modules.title: Optional modules
modules.hint: Enable only the modules your shop uses. Disabled modules are hidden from the menu and blocked from direct URLs.
modules.bankLoans_hint: Bank re-pledge, batches, and loan bank deposit workflows.
modules.auctions_hint: Auction notices, legal clearance, sales, and settlements.
modules.investments_hint: Capital investments, ledger, and profit sharing.
modules.gl_hint: Chart of accounts, journal entries, and trial balance.
modules.notifications_hint: SMS / reminder processing and notification queue.

preferences.title: Application preferences
preferences.hint: Dashboard refresh, session timeout, and optional module visibility.
preferences.session_timeout_hint: Users are logged out after this period of inactivity. JWT tokens use the same duration.
preferences.session_timeout_range: Session timeout must be between {{min}} and {{max}} minutes.

users.hint: Create login accounts and assign roles. JWT authentication with role-based access control.
users.name: Name
users.password_required: Password is required for new users.

roles.hint: Six roles with fixed permissions. Super Admin has full access.

audit.hint: Every create, update, and delete action is logged automatically.

branches.branch_name_hint: Short name shown in the branch selector (e.g. Main, North).
